responsibilities: Design, develop, test, and debug backend services and APIs using Python and FastAPI, ensuring highperformance, reliability, and maintainability
Build server‑side logic, integrate RESTful services, and support microservice‑based architecturesaligned with enterprise standards
Work extensively with SQL‑based data sources, writing, optimizing, and maintaining complex queries, views, and stored procedures to support application logic, reporting, and data enrichment
Develop scripts and services for data extraction, transformation, processing, and system automation, integrating both relational (SQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) databases
Contribute to solution and application architecture, including system design, integration patterns, dataflows, and scalability considerations
Collaborate with architects and senior engineers to ensure solutions are secure, well‑designed, and production‑ready
Support GenAI‑enabled features where applicable, such as prompt design, retrieval from structured data, and vectorized search, without being focused on model development

Partner closely with cross‑functional teams and stakeholders, applying strong people and communication skills to translate requirements, explain technical concepts, and support delivery from design through production
